name: EuiKeyPadMenuItem
visualDescription: A single square or rectangular tile with a large centered icon (~32px) above a short text label (~12px). Has a visible border, consistent padding, and a hover state that fills the background. Selected state shows a primary color fill or checkmark. Part of a EuiKeyPadMenu grid.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

isSelected.description:
Indicate if an item is the current one.
Be sure to use `true` AND `false` when acting as a toggle to ensure the attribute is added for both states

label.description: The text to display beneath the icon

onClick.description: Use `onChange` instead when the item is `checkable`

checkable.description:
Beta badges are unavailable if the item is checkable
Type `'multi'` renders the item as a `<label>` and
adds a checkbox.
Type `'single'` renders the item as a `<label>` and
adds a radio element.

betaBadgeLabel.description: Add a badge to the card to label it as "Beta" or other non-GA state

betaBadgeIconType.description: Supply an icon type if the badge should just be an icon

betaBadgeTooltipContent.description: Add a description to the beta badge (will appear in a tooltip)

betaBadgeTooltipProps.description: Extends the wrapping EuiToolTip props when `betaBadgeLabel` is provided
